title: Kaupen's Carved Pumpkins
description: A small Halloween Themed Mod that allows you to change Carved Pumpkin Patterns.
body:
![Kaupen's Carved Pumpkins Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EVfOalx5/images/dd4060775bfdd044cedc9a3f866ccf5e20740724.png)

Adds 8 NEW CARVED PUMPKIN designs to Minecraft!

Simply right-click a carved pumpkin with shears to cycle its design!

It also adds Carved Melons to the game with 2 designs inspired by Minecraft Earth!

All Carved Pumpkin Designs:
![All the Pumpkins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/670fdccb3b5047c2875160d3c14e5099f7d165ee.png)

All Carved Melon Designs:
![All the Melons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69463b15463bdbf3692cd2c8de393c75a05b003d.png)

All Textures by Nanoattack

![Should we add Freaky Pumpkin?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce6c3a3080f3700dac6d669c439f30b78d90ec9b.png)
